name.description: Extension name displayed in Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions. Keep short.

short_name.description: Short name for the extension. Used in the toolbar.

description.description: Extension description for Chrome Web Store listing. TEXT MAX LENGTH: 132

popup_enable_promo_skip.description: Label next to the main enable/disable switch in the popup

popup_enable_auto_skip_aria.description: Accessible label for the enable/disable switch in the popup

popup_active_tab_prefix.description: Prefix before the detection status line in the popup. Includes trailing space.

popup_open_settings.description: Button in the popup that opens the options page

popup_reliability_notice_title.description: Title for the yellow alert box in the popup

popup_reliability_notice_body_1.message: TopSkip may rely on parts of YouTube's site that are not a documented public API—the same general area the YouTube web client uses. There is no guarantee that auto-skip will keep working if YouTube changes how the page behaves.
popup_reliability_notice_body_1.description: First paragraph of the reliability notice in the popup

popup_reliability_notice_body_2.message: If it stops working, please report it where you installed this extension (for example the Chrome Web Store support options, if you installed it from there).
popup_reliability_notice_body_2.description: Second paragraph of the reliability notice in the popup

popup_detection_not_configured.description: Detection status shown when OpenRouter is not set up

popup_detection_unavailable.description: Detection status shown when detection is unavailable

popup_detection_analyzing.description: Detection status shown during transcript analysis

popup_detection_detected.description: Detection status shown when promo blocks are found

popup_detection_no_promo.description: Detection status shown when no promo blocks are found

popup_detection_error.description: Detection status shown when detection fails

popup_detection_server_acquisition_badge.description: Статус во время получения субтитров расширением.

popup_detection_server_acquisition_title.description: Заголовок во время получения субтитров расширением.

popup_detection_server_acquisition_descr.message: TopSkip получает таймкоды субтитров из открытого видео.

popup_detection_server_acquisition_body.message: Анализ промо начнётся сразу после получения субтитров.

popup_detection_server_pending_badge.description: Popup status badge shown while the TopSkip backend is analyzing the current video.

popup_detection_server_pending_title.description: Popup title shown while the TopSkip backend is analyzing the current video.

popup_detection_server_pending_descripti.message: TopSkip asked the server to analyze this video.
popup_detection_server_pending_descripti.description: Popup description shown while the TopSkip server is processing a video.

popup_detection_server_pending_headline.description: Popup headline shown for a server processing response.

popup_detection_server_pending_body.message: Skipping will start when the TopSkip backend has promo blocks for a future playback position.
popup_detection_server_pending_body.description: Popup body shown for a server processing response.

popup_detection_server_error_badge.description: Popup status badge shown when server analysis fails.

popup_detection_server_error_title.description: Popup title shown when the TopSkip server request fails.

popup_detection_server_error_description.message: TopSkip could not use the server for this video.
popup_detection_server_error_description.description: Popup description shown when server analysis cannot run.

popup_detection_server_error_headline.description: Fallback popup headline shown when no specific server error is available.

popup_detection_server_error_body.message: The TopSkip server did not return a usable response. Playback continues without server-detected skips.
popup_detection_server_error_body.description: Popup body shown for server request failures.

popup_detection_server_cache_badge.description: Popup status badge shown when promo blocks came from the TopSkip backend cache.

popup_detection_server_cache_title.description: Popup title shown when the TopSkip backend returns cached promo blocks.

popup_detection_server_cache_description.message: TopSkip received cached promo blocks from the server.
popup_detection_server_cache_description.description: Popup description shown for a server cache-hit response.

popup_detection_server_cache_headline.description: Popup headline shown when a server cache hit is ready.

popup_detection_server_no_promo_badge.description: Popup status badge shown when server analysis completes with no promo blocks.

popup_detection_server_no_promo_title.description: Popup title shown when server analysis completes with no promo blocks.

popup_detection_server_no_promo_descript.message: TopSkip checked the server result for this video.
popup_detection_server_no_promo_descript.description: Popup description shown when a server terminal no-promo result is available.

popup_detection_server_no_promo_headline.description: Popup headline shown when server analysis finds no promo blocks.

popup_detection_server_no_promo_body.message: Playback continues normally unless future server results add blocks.
popup_detection_server_no_promo_body.description: Popup body shown when server analysis finds no promo blocks.

popup_detection_server_unavailable_badge.description: Popup status badge shown when server analysis is unavailable.

popup_detection_server_unavailable_title.description: Popup title shown when server analysis reaches an unavailable terminal state.

popup_detection_server_unavailable_descr.message: The TopSkip server could not produce a result for this video.
popup_detection_server_unavailable_descr.description: Popup description shown when server analysis cannot produce a result.

popup_detection_server_unavailable_headl.description: Fallback popup headline shown when no specific server unavailable reason is available.

popup_detection_server_unavailable_body.description: Popup body shown when server analysis is unavailable.

options_description.message: Configure OpenRouter for transcript analysis. The API key is stored only in this browser profile (extension local storage).
options_description.description: Description text below the heading on the options page

options_enable_detection.description: Checkbox label on the options page

options_api_key_label.description: Label for the API key input on the options page

options_api_key_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the API key input

options_api_key_saved.message: Saved key: %mask% - leave blank to keep it.
options_api_key_saved.description: Shown below API key input when a key is already saved. %mask% is the masked key value.

options_api_key_none.description: Shown below API key input when no key has been saved

options_model_label.description: Label for the model select dropdown on the options page

options_model_description.message: Built-in presets and models you added below.
options_model_description.description: Help text below the model select dropdown

options_add_model_heading.description: Heading for the custom model section on the options page

options_add_model_description.message: Type an OpenRouter model id (for example vendor/model), then Add to keep it for later sessions. This is not the same as Save below.
options_add_model_description.description: Help text for the custom model input section

options_custom_model_label.description: Label for the custom model text input

options_custom_model_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the custom model text input

options_add_button.description: Button to add a custom model id

options_your_models_heading.description: Heading above the list of user-added custom models

options_remove_button.description: Button to remove a custom model from the list

options_saved.description: Success message shown after saving settings

options_save_button.description: Button to save all settings on the options page

options_reload_button.description: Button to reload settings from storage on the options page

options_save_help.message: Save applies the detection toggle, API key (if changed), and the selected model. Use Add to store extra model ids in your list.
options_save_help.description: Help text below the Save/Reload buttons

options_error_bg_no_response.message: Extension background did not respond. Click Reload or reload the extension on chrome://extensions.
options_error_bg_no_response.description: Error shown when the background service worker is unreachable

options_error_load_failed.description: Generic error when loading settings fails

options_error_save_failed.description: Generic error when saving settings fails

options_error_add_model.description: Error when adding a custom model fails

options_error_remove_model.description: Error when removing a custom model fails

content_skip_applied.description: Brief toast notification shown on YouTube after a promo block is skipped

prefs_error_load.description: Error fallback in preferences store when loading fails

prefs_error_save.description: Error fallback in preferences store when saving fails

options_no_custom_models.description: Shown in the add-model section when the user has not saved custom models yet.

options_connections_heading.description: Heading for the provider API key connections section on the options page.

options_connections_description.message: Save and test API keys for cloud models.
options_connections_description.description: Help text for the provider API key connections section on the options page.

options_connection_required_badge.description: Badge shown on a provider connection when the active model needs that API key.

options_connection_key_saved.description: Status badge for a provider connection with a saved API key.

options_connection_key_missing.description: Status badge for a provider connection without a saved API key.

options_connection_key_placeholder.description: Placeholder for provider API key inputs in the connections section.

options_connection_test_button.description: Button that validates a provider API key in the connections section.

options_connection_key_valid.description: Success message shown after a provider API key test passes.

options_analysis_mode_heading.description: Heading for the analysis route selector in extension settings.

options_analysis_mode_server_label.description: Label for the default server-backed analysis mode.

options_analysis_mode_server_description.message: Uses TopSkip analysis and shared cached results.
options_analysis_mode_server_description.description: Description shown when TopSkip Server mode is selected.

options_analysis_mode_byok_label.description: Label for the private bring-your-own-key analysis mode.

options_analysis_mode_byok_description.message: Uses your configured provider in this extension.
options_analysis_mode_byok_description.description: Description shown when Private BYOK mode is selected.

options_analysis_mode_byok_privacy.message: Your watched video ID and analysis result are not sent to TopSkip Server. TopSkip Server is never used as a fallback in this mode.
options_analysis_mode_byok_privacy.description: Privacy and no-fallback disclosure shown for Private BYOK mode.

options_analysis_mode_setup_required.message: Setup required: choose a provider and configure the selected model before using Private BYOK.
options_analysis_mode_setup_required.description: Guidance shown when Private BYOK is selected without a runnable provider.

options_analysis_mode_save_error.description: Fallback error shown when saving the selected analysis mode fails.

popup_analysis_mode_label.description: Label for the selected analysis route in the popup.

popup_analysis_mode_server.description: Popup label for the server-backed analysis mode.

popup_analysis_mode_byok.description: Popup label for the private provider analysis mode.

popup_byok_setup_badge.description: Popup status badge shown when Private BYOK is not configured.

popup_byok_setup_title.description: Popup title shown when the selected BYOK provider is unavailable.

popup_byok_setup_description.message: Configure %provider% in settings before promo analysis can run.
popup_byok_setup_description.description: Popup BYOK setup guidance. %provider% is replaced with the selected provider name.

popup_byok_setup_body.message: Analysis stays with your configured provider and is not shared with TopSkip.
popup_byok_setup_body.description: Popup privacy reminder for an unconfigured Private BYOK route.

popup_server_limitation_title.message: This video could not be analyzed
popup_server_limitation_title.description: Popup title for a server analysis limitation specific to the video.

popup_server_limitation_description.description: Popup reassurance for video-specific server limitations.

popup_server_limitation_headline.message: TopSkip could not process this video.
popup_server_limitation_headline.description: Popup headline for video-specific server limitations.

popup_server_limitation_body.description: Popup body for video-specific server limitations.

popup_server_temporary_title.description: Popup title for temporary server capacity failures.

popup_server_temporary_description.message: Your settings are working. Try again later.
popup_server_temporary_description.description: Popup reassurance for temporary server capacity failures.

popup_server_temporary_headline.description: Popup headline for temporary server capacity failures.

popup_server_temporary_body.description: Popup body when the server does not provide a retry time.

popup_server_temporary_retry.description: Popup retry guidance. %seconds% is replaced with the server retry delay.

popup_server_failure_title.description: Popup title for a reportable TopSkip server failure.

popup_server_failure_description.message: The problem is on the TopSkip server, not in your settings.
popup_server_failure_description.description: Popup reassurance for a reportable server failure.

popup_server_failure_headline.message: The server could not analyze this video.
popup_server_failure_headline.description: Popup headline for a reportable TopSkip server failure.

popup_server_failure_body.message: Playback continues normally. You can report this error on GitHub.
popup_server_failure_body.description: Popup body for a reportable TopSkip server failure.

popup_server_upgrade_title.description: Popup title when the server requires a newer extension.

popup_server_upgrade_description.message: This server version requires a newer extension.
popup_server_upgrade_description.description: Popup description when the server requires a newer extension.

popup_server_upgrade_headline.description: Popup headline when the server requires a newer extension.

popup_server_upgrade_body.message: Update TopSkip and try this video again.
popup_server_upgrade_body.description: Popup body when the server requires a newer extension.

popup_server_report_primary.description: Primary popup button for a reportable server failure.

popup_server_report_secondary.description: Secondary popup button for a possibly incorrect video limitation.
